'''''Star Wars Tales'' 12''' is the twelfth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[June 5]], [[2002]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].<ref name="DarkHorse" /> The story "[[A Jedi's Weapon]]" had previously been released as [[Free Comic Book Day 2002 Special]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="FCDB">Free Comic Book Day 2002 Special</ref> on [[May 4]].<ref name="FCBD2002">The [[Free Comic Book Day 2002 Special]] was published on [[Free Comic Book Day]] in [[2002]], which was held in [[May 4]] according to {{WebCite|url=https://www.freecomicbookday.com|text=Home Page - Free Comic Book Day|author=[[Wikipedia:Diamond Comic Distributors|Diamond Comic Distributors]]|archivedate=20020120140609}}.</ref>

==Publisher's summary==
''The ''Star Wars'' universe is painted with a wide and varied palate and this issue highlights that variety! Join Wedge Antilles as he valiantly fights squadrons of Imperial TIE fighters. Be there as Qui-Gon Jinn and his Padawan, Obi-Wan Kenobi, face off against Jedi killer Aurra Sing! Face the evil genius of Darth Vader! Witness a panicked Anakin Skywalker as he struggles to retrieve his stolen lightsaber! And stumble to a halt in the belly of the almighty Sarlacc with the bumbling Tag and Bink...This is one issue of Tales you won't want to miss!''
